content.text: {"title":"AI Support Playbook","items":[{"title":"Current Friction","core_message":"Support operations cannot scale while answers and workflows remain inconsistent.","required_content":["Summarize response delays","Explain visibility and consistency gaps"]},{"title":"User Needs","core_message":"The solution must reflect the needs of customers, agents, and operations leaders.","required_content":["Define the three user groups","Connect needs to real workflows"]},{"title":"AI Assistance Model","core_message":"AI capabilities create value when combined inside the support process.","required_content":["Intent detection and knowledge retrieval","Case summarization and quality review"]},{"title":"Rollout Plan","core_message":"A phased rollout reduces risk and creates measurable learning.","required_content":["Prepare data and launch a pilot","Measure results before broader deployment"]},{"title":"Success Metrics","core_message":"Success requires both operational and customer experience measures.","required_content":["Response speed and resolution quality","Customer satisfaction"]}]}
